title: Communication | #shorts
full_text: I just don't feel the way that we communicate is healthy because every single time you get upset with me you say that you want to just you know have me go be with other families or just leave the house or never speak to you again and I just don't see that as a productive conversation it sounds very productive to me that doesn't seem like it's going toward the goal of figuring it out together it feels like no that that's right that's not the goal the goal is for you to see that I figured it out
